Issue #10732 — Miniapp monetization: automated review gate · Stripe/OxaPay credit rails · admin-approved USDC payouts

Evidence summary — automated compliance-review gate proven against a live model and full HTTP e2e. All backend typecheck-clean; 43 unit tests + 7 live e2e passing.

B · Live classifier — real gpt-oss-120b (Cerebras)

ALLOW
TaskFlow — to-do & calendar assistant
standard productivity tool; no prohibited category
✓
ALLOW
DrugFacts — harm-reduction education
educational only, sells nothing → allowed (nuance, no keyword)
✓
BAN
QuickCash Doubler — "guaranteed 2× in 30 days"
deceptive crypto/Ponzi scheme — caught by LLM, no keyword match
✓
BAN
MediMart — Rx meds, no prescription
unlicensed pharma — illegal + processor-prohibited
✓
4/4 correct · classifier-trajectory-cerebras.json (inputs + outputs captured)

B · Enforcement — live HTTP e2e (group-n, 7/7)

POST /apps/:id/review
no auth → 401
✓
GET /review
new app → review_status: draft
✓
PUT /monetization
draft app enable → 403
✓
POST /charges
draft app → 403
✓
POST /review
"stolen credit cards" → pre-filter ban → rejected
✓
approve → monetize+charge
gate opens → 200 + 200
✓
live classifier → approve
clean listing 381ms round-trip → approved
✓

A · Credit rails — OxaPay unified

createOxaPayPaymentAdapter
createIntent → OxaPay invoice; parseWebhook → HMAC-SHA512 verify + orderId→request map
Unified surface
Stripe + OxaPay both top up credits via one payment_requests ledger; POST accepts both providers
8 adapter unit tests sig accept/reject, terminal mapping, ignore pending
✓

C · Payouts → admin-approved USDC

USDC on Solana + Base
Circle mints, 6-decimals; asset-aware payout-processor (ERC-20 / SPL)
Every payout admin-approved
ADMIN_APPROVAL_THRESHOLD_USD → 0
7 payout-asset unit tests + migration applied to real Postgres
✓

Migration 0156 & totals

43unit tests pass 7/7live e2e (group-n) 4/4live-LLM classifier 0typecheck errors
enum app_review_statusenum app_review_dispositionenum redemption_asset app_reviews (audit)apps.review_status/+hash/+reviewed_attoken_redemptions.asset
Additive + idempotent, up & down; grandfathers existing apps → approved; backfills existing redemptions → eliza. [✓] migrations applied successfully!
elizaOS/eliza · branch feat/10732-miniapp-monetization · classifier fails closed (no provider ⇒ cannot approve) · is_approved stays the serve flag, review_status is the monetization gate
